global_description: Compact rectangular appliance with metallic or plastic exterior, typically silver or black, featuring slots on top for bread slices, control knobs or buttons on the side, and a lever for lowering bread.

part_details.slots: Two or four narrow slots on top for bread slices
part_details.body: Rectangular with metallic or plastic finish, often silver or black
part_details.controls: Knobs or buttons on the side for settings
part_details.lever: Lever on the side for lowering bread into slots

spatial_relations: Slots positioned on top of the body
